criticalRules: Preserve exact port styles from reference
exprs stores the initial condition as a string, and state must also be set to the same numeric value as a realPart
When you change the initial condition, update BOTH exprs[0] and the matching ScilabDouble state entry to the same value
Copy the empty realParameters/integerParameters layout exactly; INTEGRAL_f keeps its IC in exprs/state rather than realParameters
anomalies: Initial condition is duplicated across exprs and state
realParameters and integerParameters remain empty in the standard block form
name: INTEGRAL_f
